meaning: n.[药]戊四唑,戊四氮(一种苏醒剂)
examples: To observe the effect of anti-epilepsy capsule on the weight of the pentylenetetrazol (PTZ) -kindled model.
To observe the effect of anti-epilepsy capsule on the convulsion of the pentylenetetrazol (PTZ) -kindled model.
Objective To explore the effect of pentylenetetrazol(PTZ)-kindled epilepsy on rats learning, memory and the expression of postsynaptic density 95(PSD-95).
